privileged_info_summary: The task edits metadata for the document 'Annual Report 2023' in the Nuxeo Platform Projects workspace. The document is stored at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. The PDF source file (annual_report_2023.pdf, 9.7 KB) is synthetic, generated by ReportLab with ACME Corporation annual report content. The task requires updating the dc:description field from empty to the specified text containing keywords 'annual', 'financial', 'fiscal', and '2023'. The verifier checks that the new description contains at least 2 of these 4 keywords and exceeds 50 characters. All document paths, API endpoints, and verification logic are consistent with task requirements. The task uses default Nuxeo admin credentials (Administrator/Administrator) at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo.
